story.headline: Wonder Brings Celebrity Chef Eats to Three More N.J. Towns This Spring
story.summary: The food hall phenomenon Wonder is expanding its New Jersey footprint with three new locations coming to Wayne, Emerson, and Ocean Township. The innovative platform lets diners order from over 20 restaurants—including menus from Bobby Flay and José Andrés—all in one transaction.
clues: A food revolution is spreading across New Jersey...
Imagine ordering tacos, pizza, AND barbecue—all at once.
Celebrity chefs are involved... think Bobby Flay.
This spring, three more N.J. towns join the party.
It's no Wonder everyone's talking about it!
